block_name: Road documents, driver requirements and realistic transit time
purpose: Road readiness gate for documents, professional-driver rules, customs transit and realistic transit-time estimation.
known_limitations: Border buffers are planning estimates, not live waits.
No country-specific public holiday truck bans.
No live ferry schedules or port congestion.
EU-centered driver-hours rules; non-EU corridor rules may require local validation.
Customs quick-info is explanatory; authentic legal text remains EU Official Journal legislation.
